DESCRIPTION: Automated monitoring system that checks SSL/TLS certificates on EC2 instances and sends alerts to Microsoft Teams before expiration. Monitors certificates daily at 9 AM and alerts team 7 days before expiry.
FUNCTION: Prevent certificate expiration incidents, provide real-time notifications, automate monitoring process
